rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption has no relation to Fam. Code §51.031, which governs habitual felony conduct in juvenile justice proceedings. The statutes address entirely different subject matters.
quote: Habitual felony conduct is conduct violating a penal law of the grade of felony, other than a state jail felony
_note: No conflict. The rule_text (Fam. Code §51.031, juvenile habitual felony conduct) is wholly unrelated to the proposed change (Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount).
